configurations.name: Build and Run ROS2 Mapping Test
configurations.command: bash -c 'cd /home/rudrh/Autonomous-Wheelchair-System/Positioning/MapGeneration/MappingTest && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source install/setup.bash && ros2 launch mapping_test mapping_test.launch.py'

configurations.name: Run ROS2 Mapping Test
configurations.command: bash -c 'cd /home/rudrh/Autonomous-Wheelchair-System/Positioning/MapGeneration/MappingTest && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source install/setup.bash && ros2 launch mapping_test mapping_test.launch.py'

configurations.name: Run ROS2 Mapping Test without RViz
configurations.command: bash -c 'cd /home/rudrh/Autonomous-Wheelchair-System/Positioning/MapGeneration/MappingTest && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source install/setup.bash && ros2 launch mapping_test mapping_test.launch.py use_rviz:=false'
